---
title: "WRDS - CRSP"
page-layout: article
---

# WRDS - CRSP

**Provider:** WRDS

## Description

Historical database of stock prices, returns, and trading activity for U.S. equity markets. A foundational resource for finance and investment research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Humanities & History
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives, Data Platform
- **Access model:** WRDS Account Required, Individual Account Required
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives, Data Platform

## Access notes

An individual WRDS account is required to access this data.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://wrds-www.wharton.upenn.edu/login/?next=/pages/get-data/center-research-security-prices-crsp/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
